blended.narrative: White Pass is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 4.2 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 1,905 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 7 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 10" of heavy snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 49.2" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 24" over the past week. Current depth: 75".
